name: Microsoft Teams
description: Team collaboration and messaging platform. Monitor team access and communication compliance.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to Azure Portal → Microsoft Entra ID → App registrations
2. Use the same app as Entra ID, or create a new one
3. Add Microsoft Graph (Application) permissions:
   - Team.ReadBasic.All
   - Channel.ReadBasic.All
4. Click 'Grant admin consent'
5. Enter the Tenant ID, Application ID, and Client Secret below

credentialFields.label: Tenant ID
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Azure Portal → Microsoft Entra ID → Overview → Tenant ID.

credentialFields.label: Application (Client) ID
credentialFields.helpText: From your Azure AD app registration.

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: From your Azure AD app registration → Certificates & secrets.

checks.name: Microsoft Teams App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Microsoft Teams API is accessible.
